titles.title: Science SARU x MBS Original Short Anime Daisakusen!
オオクニヌシとスクナビコナ
サイエンスSARU×MBS オリジナルショートアニメ大作戦!

data.title: Science SARU x MBS Original Short Anime Daisakusen!
data.title_japanese: サイエンスSARU×MBS オリジナルショートアニメ大作戦!
title_synonyms: オオクニヌシとスクナビコナ
data.synopsis:
A series of shorts made by Science SARU airing on the late-night MBS "Super Animeism" block.

Episodes:
#1: Ookuninushi to Sukunabikona (Directed by Akitoshi Yokoyama)
#2: MOON Episode 1 Sandwich (Directed by Eri Kinoshita)
#3: MOON Episode 2 Camping (Directed by Eri Kinoshita)
#4: Panteon no Tori (Directed by Eun-Yeong Choi, Ayami Murakoshi)

titles.title: Pokémon: A Good Day for a Dream
A Good Day for a Dream

data.title: Liang Chen You Meng
data.title_english: A Good Day for a Dream
title_synonyms: Pokémon: A Good Day for a Dream
data.synopsis:
Liang Chen You Meng is a Pokémon animated short that was released on Weibo, Douyin, and Bilibili in mainland China on February 2, 2024 in celebration of Chinese New Year.

(Source: Bulbapedia)

data.title_japanese: 大堪能企画! "死の外科医" トラファルガー・ロー
data.synopsis: The first recap special of Egghead arc that covers Trafalgar Law's history with narration by Bepo and Chopper.

titles.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Game: The Chronicles PV

data.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Game: The Chronicles PV
data.synopsis:
A showcase advertising Konami's new animation department depicting several different themes.

It should be noted this is not a trailer for upcoming shows, but more of a demo reel to showcase the talents of Konami animation, with a variety of animation styles.

(Source: ygorganization)
data.background: The animation was first aired during the livestream of Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters: The Legend of Duelist Quarter Century, a tournament event celebrating the 25th anniversary of the Official Card Game. It was subsequently made available on Konami's YouTube channel, as well the various Yu-Gi-Oh! TCG/OCG ones.

titles.title: The King of Fighters: Awaken PV

data.title: The King of Fighters: Awaken PV
data.synopsis: A trailer for an unreleased film, intended to be a sequel to The King of Fighters: Destiny. Announced in 2020 with a 2022 release date, but with no further news since then, only the trailer is available.
